---
name: Feature request
about: Add a mode, improve a routing decision, tighten a UX rule
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Which skill?**
e.g. `kolbo-marketing-studio` — adding a new ad mode.

**What's the user-facing change?**
"When I say X, the agent should do Y instead of Z."

**Is this additive (safe) or breaking?**
- [ ] Additive — new mode / new optional flag / new reference file (safe, minor bump)
- [ ] Breaking — changes existing routing, renames, removes (needs major bump + deprecation path)

**Does this need a kolbo-mcp change first?**
If yes, link the upstream PR or issue.
